body.title: Consequence check: encapsulation audit check adoption
body.result: closed — pe_chain coding mechanism decommissioned; ticket no longer relevant to reasoning-first direction
body.description:
**What changed:** audit-design gained Check 10 (encapsulation surface) and EXPERTS.md gained encapsulation key questions for Systems Architect and Process/Meta experts.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) Check 10 may be too broad and fire as AMEND on every design, adding noise; (2) Check 10 may be too narrow and never fire because encapsulation issues are subtle; (3) EXPERTS.md encapsulation question may be redundant with existing coupling/cohesion questions and not add signal.
**Signals to watch:** audit-design output over next 30 days — did Check 10 fire at least once? Was it signal (legitimate encapsulation gap caught) or noise (false alarm that blocked a good design)? Did the Systems Architect expert surface an encapsulation finding in any audit-expert run?
**Gate condition:** Check after T-audit-expert-encapsulation-lens closes (both tickets shipped).

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe; annotate as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket
